overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence showing a character riding a futuristic hoverbike through a cyberpunk city at dusk. The camera follows the vehicle as it speeds along elevated highways and weaves between neon-lit skyscrapers, transitioning from an open coastal view to dense urban canyons.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal elevated highway with ocean view

agents.ego_description: riding the hoverbike along a curved elevated highway with the green tower visible ahead

entered.detail: tall green cylindrical tower with orange accents and '02' signage
calm ocean water visible beyond the highway edge
curved multi-lane highway with glowing lane markings
cluster of tall buildings with illuminated windows and neon signs

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a sweeping view of a futuristic coastal highway at dusk. The hoverbike speeds along the elevated road with the ocean visible to the left and a dense neon-lit skyline to the right. The distinctive green tower marked '02' dominates the forward view as the vehicle approaches.

events.description: banking sharply right around the green tower
transitioning from coastal highway to inland urban area

agents.ego_description: banking the hoverbike around the green tower and heading inland over lower buildings

entered.detail: shorter structures below the flight path

segments.scene_description: The vehicle banks sharply right around the green tower, leaving the coastal view behind. As it turns inland, the camera reveals lower buildings below and a prominent 'TENGU' sign on a rooftop. The lighting remains mixed with the last natural dusk light blending with the city's neon glow.

events.description: entering darker urban canyon with reduced natural light

agents.ego_description: speeding through dense cluster of skyscrapers with neon advertisements flashing by

entered.detail: tightly packed high-rise buildings with reflective glass facades
large illuminated advertisements on building sides

segments.scene_description: Flying deeper into the city center, the scene becomes enclosed by towering glass skyscrapers on all sides. The natural light fades significantly as the vehicle enters an urban canyon, with artificial neon billboards providing most of the illumination. The density of buildings increases dramatically.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed elevated highway through deep urban canyon

events.description: entering narrow elevated highway corridor between tall buildings
lighting shifts to predominantly artificial neon as natural light fades completely

agents.ego_description: following the elevated green rail through a narrow neon-lit canyon with steam vents

entered.detail: green and yellow elevated track structure with safety barriers
industrial steam emissions rising between buildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a deeply enclosed urban canyon following a green elevated rail. The sky is almost completely obscured by towering buildings on both sides, creating a claustrophobic corridor lit entirely by neon signs and street lights. Steam vents add atmospheric haze as the vehicle speeds through the narrow passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an open coastal highway at dusk into a claustrophobic, neon-lit urban canyon. It begins with a sweeping view of the ocean to the left and a distant skyline to the right, speeding toward a prominent green tower marked 02. As the hoverbike banks sharply right around the tower, the coastal vista vanishes and the scene shifts inland, revealing lower rooftops and a glowing TENGU sign under a blend of natural dusk and artificial light. The environment then becomes increasingly enclosed as the vehicle flies deeper into the city center, where towering glass skyscrapers replace the open horizon and neon billboards become the primary light source. Finally, the camera enters a narrow corridor following a green elevated rail, where the sky is completely obscured by buildings and steam vents add a hazy atmosphere to the deeply recessed urban passage.
